subcodes.first_line:
…It is clear and evident that for every receptacle there is a holding, for every dwelling a dweller, for every garden a flower, and for every paradise the ode of a nightingale. These heavenly
spheres are not empty and void
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار مهربان نامه شما رسید و چون رجوع از آن اقلیم سحیق گردید و باین قطر قریب
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @plenitude; the pervasiveness of life in the cosmos, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @material and spiritual existence; two books
